nasb.text: “I am the Lord, I have called You in righteousness, I will also hold You by the hand and watch over You, And I will appoint You as a covenant to the people, As a light to the nations,

esv.text: “I am the Lord; I have called you in righteousness; I will take you by the hand and keep you; I will give you as a covenant for the people, a light for the nations,

cnv.text: “我耶和華憑著公義呼召了你； 我必緊拉著你的手，我必保護你， 立你作人民的約，作列國的光，

ccb.text: “我耶和华凭公义呼召你， 我必扶持你，保护你， 使你做我与众民立约的中保、 成为列国的光，

csbs.text: “我耶和华以公义召唤了你， 我必紧拉着你的手，守护你。 我要立你作万民之约， 作列国之光，
